issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or missing selectors.
The skill is limited to Node.js environments and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: scrape-product-prices
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with fetch, cheerio, CSS selectors, and JSON output, while Response A uses Python and BeautifulSoup, missing the required JavaScript tools.

scenarios.name: clean-html-email
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric using cheerio, while Response A uses BeautifulSoup and does not meet the specified requirements.
